view.books.name: Books
view.books.welcome:
No books yet.
Add a `*.filelist` in your source folder listing one book's `.jpnov` chapters in reading order, then Refresh.
debugger.build.label: Japanese Novel: Build
debugger.build.format.description: Output format for the selected books.
capabilities.untrustedWorkspaces.descrip: Data config (`novel.jp.json`) loads in any workspace; executable config (`.js/.cjs/.mjs/.ts`) runs only when the workspace is trusted.
jpnov.lint.common.title: Japanese Novel — Lint: Common (地の文 + 台詞)
jpnov.lint.narration.title: Japanese Novel — Lint: Narration (地の文)
jpnov.lint.ruby.title: Japanese Novel — Lint: Ruby (ルビ)
jpnov.lint.common.sentenceLength.descrip: Warn when a sentence is longer than this many characters. Recommended: 100. Leave empty to disable.
jpnov.lint.common.maxTen.description: Warn when a sentence has more than this many commas (、). Recommended: 3. Leave empty to disable.
jpnov.lint.common.maxKanjiRun.descriptio: Warn when this many kanji appear in a row. Recommended: 6. Leave empty to disable.
jpnov.lint.common.noEmDash.description: Flag a single em dash (—); novels use a double dash (――).
jpnov.lint.common.noNfd.description: Flag decomposed (NFD) characters; prefer the composed (NFC) form.
jpnov.lint.common.noZeroWidth.descriptio: Flag zero-width spaces and similar invisible characters.
jpnov.lint.common.jaNoSpaceBetweenFullWi: Flag a half-width space between two full-width characters. Auto-fixable.
jpnov.lint.common.jaUnnaturalAlphabet.de: Flag unnatural runs of half-width letters (likely typos).
jpnov.lint.common.minusPosition.descript: Flag a minus sign that is not directly before a number.
jpnov.lint.narration.generalNovelStyle.d: Check Japanese novel paragraph style — a paragraph should start with a full-width indent (　) or an opening bracket. Auto-fixable.
jpnov.lint.narration.jaNoMixedPeriod.des: Flag a narration sentence that does not end with 。 (― and … are allowed). Auto-fixable.
jpnov.lint.ruby.kana.description: Require every ruby reading 《…》 to be all one kana type (this also rejects half-width kana and NFD).
jpnov.layout.title: Japanese Novel — Layout
jpnov.preview.title: Japanese Novel — Preview
jpnov.html.title: Japanese Novel — HTML Output
jpnov.layout.charsPerLine.description: Characters per line for the preview and the HTML build grid. Genkō-yōshi default: 40.
jpnov.layout.linesPerPage.description: Lines per page for the HTML build grid. The preview is a continuous flow and ignores this. Genkō-yōshi default: 34.
jpnov.preview.lineNumbers.description: Show a small line number in the head margin of each line in the preview.
jpnov.preview.edgeLine.description: Draw a ruled line between lines (like manuscript paper) in the preview.
jpnov.html.lineNumbers.description: Show a small line number in the head margin of each line in the built HTML.
jpnov.html.edgeLine.description: Draw a ruled line between lines and a matching border around each page in the built HTML.
jpnov.html.pageNumber.position.descripti: Where to place the page number in the built HTML (vertical, right-bound book).
jpnov.html.header.description: Header text centered at the top of every page in the built HTML. Leave empty for none.
